features.claim: Antigravity CLI scopes conversation histories to the current working directory, preventing context pollution across projects.
features.name: Workspace scoping

features.claim: Users can return to prior conversations to continue an implementation or refine an existing solution.
features.name: Resuming sessions
subfeatures: Resuming via the TUI session picker: An interactive Conversation Picker overlay lets users search, filter, and resume prior sessions within the terminal UI.
Importing conversations from Antigravity 2.0: CLI users can import and resume conversation threads originally started in the Antigravity 2.0 desktop visual editor.
Quick resume via the command line: Launching with --continue instantly resumes the most recent session, or a specific session can be loaded by passing its ID.

features.claim: The /fork command clones the entire conversation history into a new independent session, enabling safe parallel experimentation.
features.name: Branching with /fork
